description: Shared cognitive state schema. All skill schemas MUST include this base via allOf. This is the single source of truth for cognitive state inputs per A-1.

cognitive_state.description: AuDHD cognitive context from PROFILE.md and AGENT.md contracts. Parsed at runtime by runtime/cognitive.py.

energy_level.description: Operator energy level per AGENT.md energy-adaptive routing. Controls: model pool, max task tier, output density, output skeleton.

active_mode.description: Inferred from PROFILE.md mode routing table. Determines output skeleton and formatting rules. Auto-inferred from input_text if not provided.

task_tier.description: AGENT.md complexity classification. T1=trivial, T2=standard, T3=complex, T4=expert, T5=critical. Controls verification requirements and model selection.

active_thread.description: Current monotropic focus thread per PROFILE.md. Prevents context switching. Agents must not open new threads without announcing.

context_switches.description: Topic switches in current session. High count (>2) triggers monotropism guard via SK-PRIORITIZE hook.
